text: I ordered this fancy gadget, and honestly, it was supposed to come with all the bells and whistles—yet, I’m sitting here with just the box and no gadget at all! It’s super frustrating. I really need a refund for it, even though I kinda think maybe it got lost in shipping or something? Just want my money back, not a replacement or anything else.
I can’t believe I paid for this and it’s broken already! I’m so frustrated right now. I expected better service and a product that works! What’s going on?

Hey, so I've been really frustrated because I noticed that my credit card got charged for my subscription twice this month. I mean, it's like, I clearly only signed up for one, right? Can you please look into this and refund the extra charge? My order number is kind of hard to find right now, but I'll dig it up if you need it!
I can’t access my account, it keeps saying my password is wrong. I reset it but still no luck.

I have been a loyal customer for quite some time, and I must express my dissatisfaction with the recent service. It's quite unfortunate, especially since I had ordered a customized product that was supposed to arrive last week. This is not acceptable, especially given that my dog’s birthday is next Monday. Please address this issue promptly.
Hey, so I ordered this thing last week, and it’s not what I thought it’d be. Can I get my money back? Not sure what the steps are, but please help!
I'm really confused and frustrated! I thought I had everything set up right, but I can't find my order anywhere. What’s going on? Can someone please help me?
Hey, quick question! Is there a size limit for file uploads on your platform? I can't find it anywhere.
hey, I can't log in anymore. it says my account is locked but I didn't do anything? can u help?

Hello, I recently purchased a product from your site, but unfortunately, it did not meet my expectations. I followed all the instructions, but it just doesn't work as advertised. I would like to initiate a refund for my order number 123456. Can you please guide me through the process? Thank you!

My app keeps crashing, like I can't even open it! I tried turning my phone on and off, even deleted some old photos, which is totally random but thought it might help?! Didn't work tho. Is this a known issue? Pls fix it!

I'm really frustrated! I ordered a product weeks ago and it still hasn't arrived, like, what is going on??? I keep checking the tracking and it says it's still in processing or whatever. This is not okay!

I’m trying to wrap my head around the various subscription plans you offer, can you explain the nuanced differences between the pro tier and the business tier? Like, what specific features or benefits set them apart? It's a bit confusing, and I want to make sure I'm choosing the right one for my needs.

hey so like does anyone know if, um, you can actually get a refund for things you bought ages ago? I mean, I thought I'd seen it somewhere but not sure. just want to double-check because my friend said something about it but also he bought a bunch of stuff and might be confused or whatever.
